description: We have learned to draw on our star at a planetary scale, and the future now feels like something we can build rather than merely survive.
We are no longer a species clinging to one wounded cradle, but a civilisation that has made multiple worlds habitable and kept going.
We have wrapped our industry around the Sun so completely that the scale of our work is no longer planetary, but stellar.
We have not become a galactic civilisation, but we have finally sent a living promise beyond the Sun and into the dark between stars.
